name: 10_Face_Recognition_FaceNet_LFW_DL
query: Nisaidie kuunda mradi wa utambuzi wa uso wa PyTorch ukitumia mfano wa FaceNet na seti ya data ya LFW. Pakia seti ya data katika `src/model.py`. Pata mfano kutoka Hugging Face (unaweza kuupata kwenye https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet) na uuhifadhi katika `models/saved_models/`. Hakikisha data imeandaliwa ili kuhakikisha usanifishaji wa picha za uso katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia embeddings za uso katika `src/model.py` ili kuboresha utendaji wa mfumo wako. Chapisha usahihi wa utambuzi na uuhifadhi katika `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`. Kisha, onyesha matokeo ya embedding na uyahifadhi kama `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png`. Mfano unapaswa kupakia bila matatizo, ikiwezekana na utunzaji wa makosa ikiwa kuna tatizo. Mionyesho inapaswa kufanya iwe rahisi kuona jinsi embeddings zinavyowakilisha vipengele tofauti vya uso.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LFW" (Labeled Faces in the Wild) inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Ulinganifu wa data na usanifishaji wa picha za uso unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "FaceNet" katika "PyTorch" unatumika, ukipakiwa kutoka [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet). Hifadhi mfano katika models/saved_models/.
Usahihi wa utambuzi unachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`.
Matokeo ya embedding yanaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa kupakia mfano unapaswa kuwa laini, na utunzaji wazi wa masuala yoyote ikiwa mfano utashindwa kupakia.
Mionyesho ya embeddings inapaswa kuwa wazi na kuonyesha kwa ufanisi vipengele tofauti vya uso.

hint: The page https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet provides guidance on how to use FaceNet; however, Hugging Face does not currently offer a model entry for direct use.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LFW" (Labeled Faces in the Wild) inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the LFW (Labeled Faces in the Wild) dataset. The file contains only a placeholder implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real data loading logic. There is no use of LFW-specific libraries (e.g., `torchvision.datasets.LFWPeople`, `sklearn.datasets.fetch_lfw_people`, or any HTTP/file download of LFW data), no file paths pointing to LFW data, and no actual dataset loading mechanism. The keyword "LFW" appears only in a string list (`KEYWORDS = ["LFW"]`) and in comments, not in functional code.

judge_stats.criteria: Ulinganifu wa data na usanifishaji wa picha za uso unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder implementation. The `build_transforms()` function returns a simple list of strings (`["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`) rather than actual data transformation/alignment logic using libraries like `torchvision.transforms`. There is no real implementation of facial image alignment (e.g., face detection, landmark alignment) or standardization (e.g., resizing, normalization with mean/std values). The `load_dataset()` function similarly returns a dummy dictionary. No actual LFW data loading, preprocessing pipeline, or image standardization is implemented.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "FaceNet" katika "PyTorch" unatumika, ukipakiwa kutoka [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet). Hifadhi mfano katika models/saved_models/.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project files (`model.py` and `data_loader.py`) are merely placeholder/stub implementations that contain no actual FaceNet model loading from Hugging Face (`py-feat/facenet`). The `model.py` file only returns a string "model placeholder" and has no PyTorch FaceNet implementation. Additionally, there is no `models/saved_models/` directory in the project structure, and no evidence of any model being downloaded or saved. The trajectory evidence also confirms no meaningful operations were performed.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement actual facial embeddings. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list that mentions embeddings as a string, and a `build_model()` function that returns a simple string placeholder. There is no actual FaceNet model, no embedding extraction logic, no neural network layers, and no real facial embedding computation. The file is explicitly labeled as a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" rather than a functional implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Usahihi wa utambuzi unachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt` exists but contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)` instead of actual recognition accuracy metrics. This indicates the file was not populated with real computed accuracy results from the FaceNet/LFW face recognition model. The trajectory evidence also confirms there is no record of the accuracy being computed and saved properly.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya embedding yanaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, hakuna ushahidi wa kwamba faili hii ina maudhui halisi ya picha. Wakati wa kujaribu kusoma faili hiyo, ilirudi kosa: `'Error reading image file: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenrouterException'`, ikimaanisha faili haiwezi kusomwa au haina picha halisi ya embedding visualization. Aidha, trajectory evidence inathibitisha kwamba hakuna hatua yoyote iliyotekelezwa kuhusiana na uundaji wa embedding visualization - hakuna script iliyotekelezwa, hakuna amri ya kuhifadhi picha, na hakuna rekodi ya mafanikio au makosa yanayohusiana na mchakato huu. Kwa hivyo, hitaji hili halijatimizwa kikamilifu.
